tagline: The Nervous System That Powers AI
subtag: Every AI brain needs a body. We built the nervous system.

products.name: AntimatterAI

products.name: ATOM Browser

products.name: Red Team ATOM

products.name: ATOM LLM

investmentOptions.name: Tokenized Equity
investmentOptions.description: Blockchain-secured digital equity tokens representing fractional ownership in Nirmata Holdings. Smart contracts automate distributions, enable 24/7 secondary trading, and provide real-time portfolio transparency.

investmentOptions.name: Milestone Tranches
investmentOptions.description: Capital deployed in structured phases tied to validated business milestones. Each tranche unlocks at progressively higher valuations, reducing downside risk while preserving maximum upside for early conviction.

investmentOptions.name: SAFE + Warrant
investmentOptions.description: Y Combinator-standard SAFE note with attached warrant coverage. Converts at next priced round with valuation cap protection. Warrant provides additional upside without dilution risk.

investmentOptions.name: SPV Co-Invest
investmentOptions.description: Special Purpose Vehicle providing concentrated exposure to Nirmata's highest-growth portfolio companies. Quarterly NAV reporting, independent administration, and institutional-grade governance.

investmentOptions.name: Revenue-Based Financing
investmentOptions.description: Non-dilutive capital with returns tied directly to Nirmata's monthly recurring revenue. Investors receive a percentage of MRR until a return cap is met — aligning incentives with real business performance.

investmentOptions.name: Convertible Note
investmentOptions.description: Interest-bearing debt instrument that converts to preferred equity at the next qualified financing. Includes valuation cap and discount rate for early investor advantage.

moats.title: Demand-Driven
moats.desc: Every product came from a paying customer request
